title: geranium dahuricum var. paishanense
intro: Geranium dahuricum var. paishanense, also known as Paishan Geranium, is a plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family and is native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Geranium dahuricum var. paishanense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
